title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 8 - 2017: 20 Area Dimensions still

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps his day on April 8, 2017 in Boulder: helping his mom with errands and dishes, working late into the night on what appears to be an art or design project (filling in buttons/shapes on a page), and rewatching a movie on Netflix while taking notes. He notes it's around 2:25-2:30 AM and that the next day is his last day of winter break before returning to work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: thinks it is really well made and enjoyed it as much as the first time
excited to be close to finishing a page, feels like it has taken forever

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-Log, for April 8th.
I can't remember what time I got up this morning, but it was like 9 or 10.
And then I was working for a little bit.
And then all of a sudden I realized my mom wanted me to go to her house.
So I went over there and helped her with stuff, clean dishes and stuff like that.
And then we went on some errands.
I helped her pick up some stuff, Katie let her in stuff, something else.
And then she dropped me off.
She'll pick me up tomorrow to take me back to pick up my bike at her house.
And so then I worked here on the same thing.
And right now, I'm just filling in blinds, filling in gaps.
And then, but I don't think I'm going to work anymore.
It's 2.30 in the morning, 2.24 in the morning.
So I'm going to record this and then pop in my little fancy videos.
And then I'll process it, upload it, go to sleep.
And then, yeah, I'll put the photos up on Flickr and then my site tomorrow.
And then, yeah, I'll get to design again.
The fun part!
Yeah, but tomorrow's my last day of winter break.
Because I work on Monday, so I guess I'll have to sleep early.
Oh, you get to sleep early.
So I was listening to different Wikipedia articles about the army of Rome.
A little bit of Renatus.
And, yeah, just that two.
Just those two.
All day.
Oh, no, but then we watched the first movie.
Since I originally got Netflix and my mom got me this TV.
And then I got off Netflix, but then I got back on Netflix today.
And then I started watching my first movie on Netflix, which was Alexander the Great.
Alexander, like, director's cut or whatever, three and a half hours an hour.
It was really good, man.
I saw it when it first came out.
But now I'm seeing it again.
Like, taking notes while I'm just reading it.
Look at it.
It's really well made.
It's really good.
So, and then I was back to work.
But, yeah, I think I'll finish this page tomorrow, which will be exciting.
Like, I'm getting done with these, like, being buried forever and stuff.
I'll write it in the nick of time, because if I continue with it, I'd go crazy.
But, you know, that's how the universe works.
Everything happens to be perfectly synchronistic.
So, let's see.
I think that's all.
How many, long time?
Well, that's enough talking.
Okay, peace out.
